reviews.review_description:
This game has potential and it can be better, I like the interface etc, but I think the sensitivity is too high, and the graphic are good but can be better, the physics are not bad but definitely not that good too, I trust the developer and I think he can fix these stuff and the game will be much better, I suggest you to add this:
- Sensitivity bar (or just reduce it)
- An option to set the table height 
- More languages (so more people can play)

developer_response.body: Thanks for your detailed feedback! We're glad you see potential in the game. We'll consider adding a sensitivity control, table height adjustment, and more language options to improve your experience. Stay tuned for updates!

reviews.review_title: Finnaly a pool table at home
reviews.review_description:
I've never had room for a pool table during my lifetime, and to be honest I'm really not sure what I was expecting but i I can safely say this game has completely tricked by little brain into the realism of having a pool table in my living room.
Mixed reality is a game changer, obviously, but the graphics implemented here and ball physics are super and really sell that physical table in front of your eyes. I'm able to spin the table as opposed to walking around it, 
Im a older gamer, but the game i really enjoy.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing your experience! We're delighted to hear that our game has brought the feel of a real pool table into your living room and that the mixed reality features have made such a positive impression. It's fantastic to know that the realistic graphics and ball physics are enhancing your immersion, and we're especially happy that you're enjoying the game regardless of age. Your feedback motivates us to keep creating engaging and realistic experiences. Thanks for playing and for your kind words!

reviews.review_description:
Pool Game is a relaxing and immersive take on snooker in VR (not golf, don’t worry!). The controls are easy to pick up, making it simple to jump in, enjoy a few games, and unwind in a variety of environments.

A helpful recognition system predicts the ball’s trajectory, which is a welcome feature for both casual players and those looking to sharpen their shots. The AI even has a bit of personality, adding a touch of spice to each match.

Currently in early access and without multiplayer, but as a solo experience it’s well executed and satisfying. A nice game to spin up for a few relaxing rounds whenever the mood strikes.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the relaxing and immersive experience of our VR Pool Game. It’s great to know that the intuitive controls, trajectory system, and AI personality are enhancing your gameplay. Your support and feedback are really appreciated, and we’re excited to continue improving the game, including adding multiplayer features in the future. Thanks for spinning up some relaxing rounds with us! 😊🎱

reviews.review_title: I enjoyed Pool Game a lot
reviews.review_description: I found Pool Game to be fun and enjoyable! Initially it was challenging for controlling the cue to line up my shot.  Then once I got the hang of it I found it fun and realistic to play. I really liked the ability to choose different scenery. Definitely give it a shot!

reviews.review_title: Pool Game Solo VR – Fun & Realistic
reviews.review_description: Absolutely love this game! The controls feel smooth and natural, and the physics make every shot satisfying. It really feels like playing pool in real life, just without having to leave home. The 8-Ball modes are great, and the atmosphere in the pool hall is super relaxing. I often put on my own music and just shoot a few games to unwind. If you enjoy billiards, this is a must-have for your VR library.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your enthusiastic review! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the realistic controls, satisfying physics, and the authentic atmosphere of the game. It's great to know that it provides that relaxing, immersive pool hall experience right at home. We appreciate your support and hope you continue to have fun shooting some great games! If you have any suggestions or want to share more about your experience, feel free to reach out. Happy billiards!

reviews.review_description: Nice pool game,but need multiplayer online or local

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your positive feedback! We're glad you enjoyed the pool game. Your suggestion for multiplayer, whether online or local, is a great idea, and we really appreciate your input. We're always working to improve the game, and we'll definitely consider adding multiplayer features in future updates. Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts! 😊🎱
Thanks! Glad you enjoy the relaxing environments!

reviews.review_description: I recently played a pool game in virtual reality and I must say, it was an incredibly immersive experience. The graphics were stunning, making it feel like I was actually standing in a pool hall. The physics of the game were very realistic, which added to the overall enjoyment. The controls were intuitive and easy to use, allowing me to easily line up my shots and apply the right amount of force. The variety of game modes and challenges kept me engaged for hours, and the multiplayer option was a great way to compete with friends or other players from around the world. Overall, the pool game in virtual reality exceeded my expectations and provided a fun and realistic gaming experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your valuable feedback
